subject: Durant, the steel-type ant Pokemon, facing forward against a rocky cave-like background
description: A single Durant occupies the center of the frame in a mid-shot against a cool blue rocky background suggesting an underground or cave environment. The creature is rendered with a metallic grey armored body, prominent mandibles, and red eyes. Its six legs and segmented ant-like form are clearly visible. The overall mood is sturdy and industrious. The palette is dominated by cool greys and blues with small red accent points at the eyes.
foreground: Durant standing on rocky ground, armored metallic body with mandibles prominent
background: Rocky cave or underground setting with cool blue tones
emotion: alert and defensive, mandibles forward, body braced
